name: Baked Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Old fashioned baked beans, in molasses and brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon on a paper-towel-lined paper plate. Heat, covered with paper towel, for 3 minutes or until crisp.
2. In a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, combine beans, onion, catsup, mustard and brown sugar. Mix thoroughly.
3. Crumble bacon and sprinkle over baked bean mixture.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes or until sauce is bubbly.
Variation: Add 6 hot dogs or 4 slices (1/2-inch thick) ham and heat an additional 2 minutes in Step 4.
